Focus Area & Key Contributions: BEM & AI/ML• Developed urban energy modeling software/web platform to design high-performance neighborhoods.• Supported a modular Neighborhood Unit (NU) framework for Canadian urban energy planning that integrates national building standards.• Serve as a peer reviewer for Scientific Reports (2025-Present) and facilitate ongoing research dissemination.

UBEM & AI/ML• Developed bottom-up building simulation pipelines (EnergyPlus, Rhino/Grasshopper, Python) and deep learning models for UBEM and climate risk assessment.• Secured competitive research funding for urban sustainability initiatives, driven by comprehensive urban heat island (UHI) measurements and weather data calibration.
